description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Make the Coverage tab self-explanatory:
1. Tooltips (title attribute) on strength badges, priority pills, stability pills, verification kind pills, change-status chips, and execute/declared pills
2. Demote the raw 'Verification entries' section to a collapsed <details>
3. Add a 'How is requirement coverage computed?' collapsed disclosure at the top of the Coverage tab explaining the strength tiers and how to tighten
title: Polish v8: tooltips + collapse raw verification + how-computed disclosure
